doccSearch.comment: WWDCNotes appbar search-pill label. Overrides the SiteKit built-in default ('Search') with 'Search sessions'. Merged over the built-in per key by UIStrings.

doccFilter.comment: WWDCNotes sidebar-tree filter-input placeholder. Overrides the SiteKit built-in default with 'Filter sessions & years'. Distinct from doccSearch (the full-text appbar search). Merged over the built-in per key by UIStrings.
